name: baseline+sysmon
description: Benign baseline with both providers subscribed. TestTarget runs untouched while ping holds the observation window open. Expected behavior: kernel-process emits its usual handful of rundown events; Sysmon emits a ProcessCreate for TestTarget and possibly a small number of ProcessAccess events from ambient processes (Discord polling, task manager). Used as the negative control for every Sysmon-based detector.

extra.notes: Requires Sysmon installed. Any ProcessAccess events that appear are ambient noise (background apps polling running processes) — useful for characterizing what 'benign' Sysmon traffic to TestTarget looks like.
